hero.headline:
Agile Teams,
Elevated by AI.
hero.subheadline: Sprint planning with real-time planning poker, AI story-point estimation, Azure DevOps integration — and AI-powered retrospectives to close every sprint strong.

features.sectionSubtitle: Stop arguing about estimates. Let data, AI, and structured retrospectives guide your team forward.

realtime.title: Real-Time Collaboration
realtime.description: Everyone votes simultaneously. Cards flip on reveal. No more anchoring bias or social influence distorting your estimates.

ai.title: AI Estimation Engine
ai.description: Our AI analyzes your last three sprints to suggest a Fibonacci story point estimate — with a confidence rating and similar-item references.

devops.title: Azure DevOps Native
devops.description: Paste a sprint URL and connect with a Personal Access Token. Your backlog is instantly imported — no manual entry.

history.title: Historical Context
history.description: Past sprint data powers smarter estimations. The AI learns from items your team has already scored and explained.

rooms.title: Instant Rooms
rooms.description: Create a room in seconds. Share a 6-character code or QR code. Participants join without needing an account.

retro.title: AI Retrospectives
retro.description: Run structured sprint retrospectives on a chalkboard or whiteboard. AI analyzes trends, spots recurring issues, and suggests concrete actions.

howItWorks.sectionTitle: From zero to shipped in minutes

connect.title: Connect Azure DevOps
connect.description: Paste your sprint board URL. Sprintermate AI parses your organization, project, and current sprint automatically.

calibrate.title: Calibrate the AI
calibrate.description: Score a handful of reference items using the Fibonacci scale. This one-time calibration teaches the AI your team's sizing conventions.

create.title: Plan Your Sprint
create.description: Create a Sprintermate AI room. Share the 6-character code. The AI suggests story points while the team votes in real time.

vote.title: Retro & Improve
vote.description: Close the sprint with an AI retrospective. See what went well, what to improve, and get concrete action items based on trend analysis.

integrations.sectionTitle: Plays well with your existing tools

login.title: Welcome to Sprintermate AI
login.description: Sign in to access sprint planning rooms, AI estimation, and retrospectives.

error.network_error: A network error occurred. Please check your connection.

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Join Sprintermate AI and start planning sprints with your team.

error.weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noRooms: No rooms yet. Create one to get started.
dashboard.noProjects: No projects yet. Create a room to connect an Azure DevOps project.
dashboard.confirmDeleteRoom: Delete this room? This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.confirmDeleteProject: Delete this project? This will also remove all associated sprints, rooms and reference scores.
dashboard.referenceExamplesDesc: Example work items with known story points to help the team calibrate estimates.
dashboard.validationError: Each reference score needs a title and a valid numeric story point value.

createRoom.title: Create a Room
createRoom.patDesc: Your account doesn't have direct Azure DevOps API access. Enter a Personal Access Token (PAT) with <scope>Work Items (Read)</scope> scope to continue.
createRoom.patGenerate: Generate a PAT at <link>dev.azure.com/_usersSettings/tokens</link> — enable <scope>Work Items (Read)</scope> scope.
createRoom.scoresDesc: Add example work items with known story points to help your team calibrate estimates. These are saved per project and pre-filled next time.
createRoom.workItemTitlePlaceholder: Work item title (e.g. Add login button)
createRoom.errorParse: Could not parse the URL. Please check it is a valid Azure DevOps sprint URL.
createRoom.errorSprints: Failed to load sprints. Make sure az CLI is logged in.
createRoom.errorCreate: Failed to create room. Please try again.
createRoom.errorValidation: Each score entry needs a title and a valid numeric story point value.
createRoom.errorSaveProject: Failed to save project. Please try again.

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.subtitle: Configure your AI provider for story point estimation
aiSettings.errorRequiresKey: Please enter an API key for this provider
aiSettings.errorEnterKeyToTest: Enter an API key to test
aiSettings.providerCopilotDesc: Uses the copilot CLI tool installed on the server (no API key needed)
aiSettings.providerClaudeDesc: Uses the claude CLI tool installed on the server (no API key needed)
aiSettings.providerCodexDesc: Uses the OpenAI codex CLI tool installed on the server (no API key needed)
aiSettings.providerGeminiDesc: Google Gemini API — enter your API key from Google AI Studio
aiSettings.providerChatGPTDesc: OpenAI GPT-4o-mini API — enter your OpenAI API key
